hero.description: Full Stack Developer & Creative Specialist with 7+ years at Harcourts Indonesia. Expert in AI-Augmented Development to build SaaS platforms 5x faster. Combining robust Node.js backend architecture with rapid creative execution.

about.title: Building Digital Solutions with Passion & Precision
about.description: I am a Full Stack Developer & Creative Specialist who combines deep technical skills with visual creativity. With 7+ years at Harcourts Indonesia, I have successfully modernized legacy systems into modern Laravel platforms, trained 100+ agents on digital sales strategies, and managed large-scale creative production.
about.description_2: Currently, I am also active as an Independent SaaS Architect, designing WhatsApp automation platforms and influencer database systems. My unique strength lies in Digital Enablement — bridging technology with business needs.

experience.title: My Career Journey
experience.description: From frontend development to SaaS architecture, here is my professional journey.
experience.akasha_desc: Responsible for automation, AI implementation, and website development on the Wix platform.
experience.indie_desc: Designing and building independent SaaS platforms focusing on automation and efficiency.
experience.indie_item_1: AutoSapa: WhatsApp automation platform (~7,000+ lines of code) with Multi-Session logic and proprietary Risk Scoring to prevent spam.
experience.indie_item_2: KOLBL: Lightweight influencer database with SQLite architecture, achieving sub-second search performance.
experience.indie_item_3: Roblox Game Dev: Complex interactive game mechanics using Lua, demonstrating advanced algorithmic logic.
experience.harcourts_title: Frontend Developer, Graphic Designer & Digital Trainer
experience.harcourts_desc: Multi-functional role combining web development, creative design, and digital training.
experience.harcourts_item_1: Annual Event Management: Led planning and execution of the Annual Corporate Event every year since 2019.
experience.harcourts_item_2: Digital Training: Monthly workshops since 2023, successfully mentoring 100+ agents on Digital Sales Strategies.
experience.harcourts_item_3: System Modernization: Revamped legacy systems into "Harcourts One" (Laravel), delivering an SEO-friendly, mobile-first interface.
experience.harcourts_item_4: Development Efficiency: Adopted AI workflows (Cursor) for landing page prototyping, reducing development turnaround by 40%.
experience.harcourts_item_5: Creative Production: Managed high-volume asset creation using Canva (Expert) and produced video series (Premiere Pro/CapCut).
experience.award_desc: School Level | Senior High School (Grade 1-2). Demonstrated strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

projects.title: Selected Works

projects.autosapa_desc: WhatsApp SaaS automation platform with ~7,000+ lines of code. Multi-Session features, proprietary Risk Scoring for spam prevention, and a scalable architecture.
